chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Const. Petition No.D-4223 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs Priority 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.17443/2025 (Stay/A) 3. For hearing of main case ---------------------------------------------- 17.09.2025 Mr. Baksh Ali Narejo, advocate for petitioners Chaudhry Muhammad Rafiq Rajorvi, Additional A.G. Sindh IO/ASI Riaz Ali Dayo of PS Hyderi ------------------------------------ IO/ASI Riaz Ali Dayo of Police Station Hyderi submits that he has recorded 161, Cr.PC statement of Petitioner No.1 Mst. Firdous and he shall submit the report under “C” Class before the concerned Magistrate. The learned Magistrate concerned is directed to ensure that appropriate orders shall be passed within three days of the filing of report under “C” Class by the IO. The instant petition is disposed of in the above terms along with pending applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES J U D G E Gulsher/PS
